    ToMany<T,U>

    Methods in io.github.simplejdbcmapper.relationship that return PopulateSpec
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PopulateSpec
    ThroughSpec.ids(String mainObjIdProperty, String relatedObjIdProperty)
    The id property names whose values are used to match the corresponding property values of properties configured in the ToManySpec.through(java.util.List<?>, java.lang.String, java.lang.String) method (intermediate table info) of the relationship.
    PopulateSpec
    ToMany.ids(String mainObjIdProperty, String relatedObjIdProperty)
     
    PopulateSpec
    ToMany.joinOn(String mainObjIdProperty, String relatedObjFkProperty)
     
    PopulateSpec
    ToManySpec.joinOn(String mainObjIdProperty, String relatedObjFkProperty)
    The properties on each list whose values should be matched to populate the toMany relationship.
    PopulateSpec
    ToOne.joinOn(String mainObjJoinProperty, String relatedObjJoinProperty)
     
    PopulateSpec
    ToOneSpec.joinOn(String mainObjJoinProperty, String relatedObjJoinProperty)
    The properties on the two lists whose values should be matched to populate the toOne relationship.
